concepts.finding: General-purpose neural embedding framework for multi-relational data. Learns embeddings for any entity type (words, sentences, documents, users, items, labels) in the same space using a unified pairwise similarity loss with negative sampling. Supports classification, ranking, similarity, and content-based recommendation.
concepts.implication: A unified embedding framework where keywords, intents, documents, and user segments all exist in the same vector space enables direct similarity computation between any entity types.
concepts.open_question: Should intents be modeled as learnable embeddings or as centroid clusters of keyword embeddings?
concepts.testable_hypothesis: Learning intent embeddings jointly with keyword embeddings (StarSpace-style) produces more coherent clusters than post-hoc clustering of keyword embeddings.
